Anatomy of the Ban Day

February 16, 2026 — from buying a premium skin to a 30-day suspension in just over six hours.

Bought hours before the ban
Galactic
3,000-currency mythic weapon skin, 03:57 — never got to enjoy it
Ranked record that morning
0–3
three straight losses fed the meltdown
Skin purchase → suspension
~6 hrs
32 messages, 47% of them flagged toxic

Three Strikes

Three sanctions in two and a half years. Each time the appeal leans on being unfairly targeted; each time Blizzard upholds it.

green = friendly · red = toxic · grey = neutral

“gg”

across 34 play sessions, the longer they stay, the worse it gets

Tone is a keyword/phrase classification of the account's own outbound chat — teammates' messages are not in the export. Political venting is counted separately from player-directed toxicity. Local times use the account's login region (US Eastern). Real cash spend counts US-dollar orders only. Appeal text and the ban reason are quoted from the export's Case History.
